name: alphafold-sovereign-mcp
description: MCP server wrapping AlphaFold DB and 8 other biomedical data sources behind a set of MCP tool calls; tool results can be persisted to a local SQLite knowledge graph via its storage API; the exposed MCP tools query and export that store read-only (automatic per-invocation persistence is not yet wired).
status_note: v1.2.0 — engineering-validated (723 tests, 100% line and branch coverage) and exercised end-to-end against the live upstream APIs. Scientific outputs (ACMG draft, druggability tier) have NOT been validated by independent domain experts. Not yet deployed in production. See STATUS.md and LIMITATIONS.md.

from_source.command: git clone https://github.com/smaniches/alphafold-sovereign-mcp && cd alphafold-sovereign-mcp && uv pip install -e .
